title: Mo' Snow Golems
description: A mod that adds more snow golem variants
body:
Are you tired of the same snow golem over and over again? Then this mod is for you!!!! It adds over 250+ snow golem variants based on minecraft blocks. 

This mod is heavily inspired by **Extra Golems** and you'll spot some functionalities based off of **Extra Golems** ( Highly recommended for you to use the mod with Extra Golems **https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/extra-golems** ) 




**The Recipe:**
Before creating a snow golem, you're going to need a Sad Pumpkin block, The crafting recipe for it is below.



![The recipe for sad pumpkin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5dce78f6669a34e4caacd94103a9c59f88e58a1d.png)




**How to Create a SnowGolem Variant:**
To create a snowgolem variant, you need to place 2 of the same blocks vertically just like a real snowgolem, with the new **Sad Pumpkin** block.

![Snow golem tutorial](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/307f1d6d850ae828bf8ff9a4023d0214f59f3196.png)  




**Mod Compatibility**:
Currently Mo' Snow Golems is compatible with [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty). Future compatibilities Are Planned, if you have any suggestion for other ones, comment out the mod with its url. You don't need to have the compatible mods in order to use Mo' Snow Golems, the compatible mods mostly add newer snowgolem variants **(NOTE: The mod will ONLY be compatible with other mods ONLY for versions 1.21.1 and above, older versions won't be compatible)**.

**The Golems:**
Each snowgolem variant, has unique abilities, and each snow golem variant has their own new projectile, Some of the projectiles contain special abilities as well. Below you can find which golems the mod adds.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Golems 1.20.1+
  
+ **Wood** SnowGolem (**All Types** Right Click with any Axe to strip the golem)
+ **Glass** SnowGolem (**All Types* Inflicts slowness) 
+ **Sculk** SnowGolem (Curently placeholder, spawns sculk when the projectile hits the ground)
+ **Sculk Catalyst** SnowGolem (Currently placeholder, spawns random sculk blocks when it dies and when the projectile hits the ground)
+ **Gravel** SnowGolem (Spawns gravel paths and inflicts blindness) 
+ **Sand** SnowGolem (Spawns sand paths and inflicts blindness) 
+ **Red** Sand SnowGolem (Spawns red sand paths and inflicts blindness)
+ **Clay** SnowGolem (Places Clay blocks whenever it hits the ground)    
+ **Jukebox** SnowGolem (Plays a disc note whenever you insert one) 
+ **Noteblock** SnowGolem (Right Click to play a note) 
+ **Bookshelf** SnowGolem (Gives itself invisibility potion effect) 
+ **Redstone Torch** SnowGolem (Puts enemies on fire and gives redstone power to blocks) 
+ **Torch** SnowGolem (Puts enemies on fire) 
+ **SoulTorch** SnowGolem (Puts enemies on fire)  
+ **Deepslate** SnowGolem (**All Deepslate variants**, Slow but tanky)
+ **Sandstone** SnowGolem (**All Sandstone Variants**, Tanky)
+ *Granite** SnowGolem
+ **Dripstone** SnowGolem (Summons a Hanging Dripstone hitting an enemy) 
+ **Sponge** SnowGolem (Soaks in water and removes water when it touches it) 
+ **Coral** SnowGolem (**All types**, Become faster and gain health in water) 
+ **Slime** SnowGolem (Splits in 2) 
+ **Honey** SnowGolem (Summons angry bees whenever it's hurt) 
+ **Bedrock** SnowGolem (Currently not invicible but has 999 health, **REQUIRES CREATIVE**) 
+ **Wool** SnowGolem (**All colours**, Immune to potions) 
+ **Cactus** SnowGolem (Hurts entities if they touch it) 
+ **Furnace** SnowGolem (Right Click to open the furnace menu) 
+ **Crafting** Table SnowGolem (Right Click to open the crafting table menu) 
+ **TNT** SnowGolem (Explodes whenever flint used on) 
+ **End Stone** SnowGolem (Teleports randomly) 
+ **Purpur** SnowGolem (**Both Variants**, Teleports randomly) 
+ **Blackstone** SnowGolem (Slow and Tanky) 
+ **Netherite** SnowGolem (Slow and Tanky) 
+ **Obsidian** SnowGolem (Slow and Very tanky) 
+ **Crying Obsidian** SnowGolem (High DPS and Tanky) 
+ **Bone** SnowGolem (Burns in Sunlight) 
+ **Redstone Lamp** SnowGolem (Emits light if it gets redstone power) 
+ **JackOLantern** SnowGolem (Requires one pumpkin and jackolantern with the sad pumpkin to be spawned, Burns enemies and emits light) 
+ **Carved Pumpkin** SnowGolem (Requires one pumpkin and jackolantern with the sad pumpkin to be spawned) 
+ **Pumpkin** SnowGolem (Use shears to turn it into carved pumpkin) 
+ **Dirt** SnowGolem (**All variants**, Grows plants when hitting the ground, Some spawn different plants) 
+ **Ore** SnowGolem (**All types**, different abilities) 
+ **Lapis** Lazuli SnowGolem (Gives random negative effects) 
+ **Emerald** SnowGolem (Gives itself Luck effect) 
+ **Leaf** SnowGolem (**All Variants**, Gives themselves regeneration) 
+ **Mushroom** SnowGolem (**All types**, Places mushrooms) 
+ **Diamond** SnowGolem (Tanky) 
+ **Target** SnowGolem (Emits redstone power when hit by arrows) 
+ **Prismarine** SnowGolem (**All Variants**, Can breathe underwater) 
+ **Coal** SnowGolem (Gives blindness) 
+ **Concrete** Powder SnowGolem (**All colours**, Turns to concrete touching water) 
+ **Netherrack** SnowGolem (**All variants**, Ignites enemies) 
+ **Soul Sand** SnowGolem (Gives wither) 
+ **Diorite** SnowGolem 
+ **Calcite** SnowGolem 
+ **Iron** SnowGolem (Tanky) 
+ **Cobblestone** SnowGolem (**Both variants**) 
+ **Stone** SnowGolem (**All variants**) 
+ **Quartz** SnowGolem (**All Variants**) 
+ **Amethyst** SnowGolem (**Both Variants**) 
+ **Glowstone** SnowGolem (Emits Light) 
+ **Sea Lantern** SnowGolem (Breathes underwater, Emits light) 
+ **Raw** SnowGolem (**All Variants**) 
+ **Kelp** SnowGolem (Breathes underwater) 
+ **Froglight** SnowGolem (**All colours**, Emits light) 
+ **Redstone** SnowGolem (Emits Redstone power) 
+ **Bricks** SnowGolem (Tanky) 
+ **Glazed** Terracotta SnowGolem (All colours) 
+ **Basalt** SnowGolem (All Variants, Gives blindness) 
+ **Nether Bricks** SnowGolem (All Variants, Ignites Enemies) 
+ **Concrete** SnowGolem (All colours) 
+ **Ice** SnowGolem (Turns water to ice walking on it, Spawns water when it dies and hits the ground)
+ **Dispenser** SnowGolem (Shoots arrows) 
+ **Fletching Table** SnowGolem 
+ **Stratography Table** SnowGolem (Right Click to open the stratography menu) 
+ **Smithing Table** SnowGolem (Right Click to open the smithing menu) 
+ **Barrel** SnowGolem (Right Click to open the barrel menu) 
+ **Loom** SnowGolem (Right Click to open the loom menu) 
+ **Melon** SnowGolem 
+ **Tuff** SnowGolem 
+ **Moss** SnowGolem (Grows plants) 
+ **Shroom** Light SnowGolem (Emits light) 
+ **Copper** SnowGolem (**All Variants**, Right click with an axe to deoxidize and unwaxify, Right click with a honeycomb to waxify, Oxidizes overtime, Summons lighting during rain and when hits the ground)  
+ **Stripped Wood** SnowGolem (**All Variants**)
+ **Dirt Path** SnowGolem (Grows plants when it hits grass blocks)
+ **Decorated Pot** SnowGolem (Has one item slot, up to 64 max stack depending on stack limit of the item, you can extract the items using right click)
+ **Cauldron** SnowGolem (Has 3 states, water, lava and powdersnow, use water bottles or buckets to fill it up or extract it with empty ones, causes random potion effects when hitting entities)
+ **Composter** SnowGolem (Fill it up using the composter table items of vanilla composter, gives you one bone meal when filled, grows grass hitting the ground)
+ **Dropper** SnowGolem (For now you can only open the gui and insert things in it)
+ **Powder** SnowGolem (Can be walked through and freezes you or other entities when close)
+ **Cobweb** SnowGolem (Can be walked through, Slows you down like vanilla cobweb, causes slowness when hitting entities)
+ **EndRod** SnowGolem (Placed with only one endrod and the sad pumpkin, teleports entitites randomly when hitting them)


Golems 1.21.1+

+ **Polished Tuff** SnowGolem
+ **Chiseled Tuff** SnowGolem
+ **Tuff Bricks** SnowGolem
+ **Chiseled Tuff Bricks** SnowGolem


Golems 1.21.5+
+ **Pale Wood** SnowGolem (All Variants Right Click with any Axe to strip the golem)
+ **Resin** SnowGolem (All Variants)
+ **Pale Moss** SnowGolem (Gives itself regeneration and Grows plants)
+ **Pale Oak Leaves** SnowGolem (Gives Itself Regeneration)



MORE TO COME




</details>

+ **Mahogany Wood** SnowGolem (**All Variants** Right Click with any Axe to strip the golem)

+ **Palm Wood** SnowGolem (**All Variants** Right Click with any Axe to strip the golem)
+ **Willow Wood** SnowGolem (**All Variants** Right Click with any Axe to strip the golem)

**FAQ:**

Q: Will Mo' Snow Golems come out to older version of minecraft?
A: Probably, if i have free time and motivation.

Q: Is Mo' Snow Golems coming to Fabric or Neoforge?
A: Mo' Snow Golems will only come to neoforge for modern versions above 1.20.1 

Q: Is this an addon to Extra Golems?
A: No. This is a separate Mod to Extra Golems by skyjay. 

Q: Does the mod add in extra functionalities or fixes to the golem's aim?
A: No. This mod is purely for snow golem variants, if you want to find a mod fixing the snow golem issue, you can find it in: **https://modrinth.com/mods?q=snow+golems**

NOTE: There's no support for these mods, And likely there will not be any. I'm not an expert in introducing modding apis into my own mods (Although compatibility with other mods might come e.g biomes of plenty).

Q: Do i have permission to make addons for the mod, and use it in a modpack?
A: Yes, As long as you link the mod.

Q: I have a suggestion/There's a bug.
A: Comment out the bug and suggestion. I'd be glad to fix some bugs and hear your suggestions!!!


**If you have any other further questions, ask in the comments and i'll gladly read them!!!**

**If you'd wish to contact me, Contact me on Discord: kevin079024 (new account)**
